title: 200 vs 201 vs 204
prompt_md: Your `POST /users` handler just created a new user and is returning the newly created user object in the response body. Which status code is most correct?
explanation_md: 201 Created specifically signals that a new resource was created as a result of the request, and it's appropriate to include the new resource in the body. 200 OK is the generic success used mainly for reads/updates that return data. 204 No Content means success with an empty body — wrong here because you *are* returning the object. 404 is an error.
